title: Spiritual forests and forest kindergartens
subtitle: This case study introduced market-based offering of burial sites of human ashes near a specific, demarcated tree and thus directed at enhancing cultural ecosystem services of forests.
description: A market-based model enables forest owners in the Canton of Aargau to sell designated burial sites for human ashes, enhancing cultural ecosystem services through conserving specific trees and surrounding forest. This study evaluates the implementation, outcomes, and upscaling potential of spiritual forests as a source of income and cultural value in Switzerland.
